titleStmt.title: SII 39.233: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 233. (A.R. No. 233 of 1916.) SRIMUSHNAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT. NITYĒŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE SOUTH WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE RĀJAKĒSARIVARMAN ALIAS CHAKRAVARTIN KULŌTTUṄGA CHŌḺADĒVA-31+1ST YEAR (1101 A.D.)

summary.p: Built in wall. At the request of Kulōttuṅgachōḻa-Suvarṇṇādhirāja, the king instructed to regroup the devadāna villages of Suṅgandavittachōḻanallūr and Ādhivarāhanallūr, respectively to the temple of Tirumuṭṭamuḍaiyamahādēva and to the temple of Ādivarāhāḻvān to avoid their overlapping. Also mentions the temples like Piḍāri, Tirunārāyaṇa-Iśvaramuḍaiya Mahādēva, in the village of Kāvanūr alias Vīrarājēndramaṅgalam in Mēṟkā nāḍu, a sub-division of Virudarājabhayaṅkara vaḷanāḍu and the big road leading to Peṇṇāgaḍam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻmātu viḷaṅka
pūmakaḷ vaḷara malar makaḷ Urimaiyi
muṭicūṭi miṉavar nilai keṭa villavar kulaitara Eṉai ma
navari riyaluṟṟuḻi tāttikkaṉaittilun ticaikkā naṭā
tti virasimhāsaṉattu Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya ko rājakesari panmarāṉa cakravattikaḷ śrī ku
lottuṅka coḷa devar Āyirattaṉiyāṉa mīṉavaṉai meṉ ko
ṇṭa coḻapuṟattuk koyiliṉuḷḷāl māḷikaiyil kīḻai
c copāṉattuc cetirājaṉileḻuntaruḷi yiruntu ceyya
t tiruvāymoḻin taruḷiṉapaṭi Iruṅkoḷappāṭi viḷantu
ntūyir kūṟṟattut teṟṟāmpaṭṭāṉa muṭikoṇṭa coḻanallū
ril tirumuṭṭamuṭaiya mahādevar tevatāṉam cuṅkantavi
tta coḻanallūrum Ātivarāhāḻvān tevatāṉam Ātivarā
ha nallūrum taṉnilai nilaṅkalantu kiṭakku meṉṟum Ippa
ṭi kiṭakkil cerāteṉṟum ropakka maṭaiyac cervākap piṟi
ttukkuṭukkuppeṟa veṇṭumeṉṟum brahmendratirarum kulottu
ṅka coḻa suvaṇṇādhirājaṉum namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ikkovil
kaḷiṉ teṟkiṭṭum peṇṇākaṭameṟa meṟku nokki poṉa peru va
kku teṟkku tirumuṭṭa muṭaiya mahātevar tevatāṉam cuṅkantavirtta co
ḻa nallūrilum śrī varāhāḻvāṉ tevatāṉamāna Ātivarāha nal
lūrilu makappaṭṭa nilattu tirunārāyaṇa Īśvaramuṭaiya mahādevar ko
yilum puṟampil tiruccuṟṟukkuḷḷum nīkkiyum peruvaḻikki vaṭakku
ppaṭṭa nilattu Ikkoyilkaḷiṉ tīttakkuḷattu teṟkiṭṭum cempā
tiyum Itaṉ kīḻai kuḷamum Itaṉ karai Irukola kalamum Ikkoyil
kaḷiṉ vaṭakkil tiruccuṟṟuc ceve meṟkil piṭāri koyiliṉ kīḻai
tiruccuṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum Ippiṭāri koyiliṉ teṟkil tiruccuṟṟuk
ku teṟku peruvaḻi nikki niṉṟa nilam nīkkiyum melaikkuṉṟa
ttūreriyum muṭpaṭa Oru kūṟāvateṉṟum Ikkūṟṟil Ekkūṟu koḷ
vaiṣṇavarai nāṉ keṭṭa Iṭattup peruvaḻikku te
ṟkku kāvaṉūruḷpaṭṭa kūṟu koḷvomeṉṟu Ivarkaḷ namakku co
ṉṉamaiyil Ipperuvaḻikku teṟku kāvaṉūrāṉa vīrarājendramaṅkala
muṭpaṭavum muṉṉūṟṟaimpatiṟṟu veli nilam potumeṉṟum
tirumuṭṭamuṭaiya mahādevarkku Ipperuvaḻikku vaṭakkuṭpaṭṭa ni
lattu munṉūṟṟaimpatiṟṟu veli nilam peṟa veṇṭumenṟum
kulottuṅka coḻassavaṇṇādhirājaṉ namakku coṉṉamaiyiṟ śrīva
rāhāḻvāṉukku muṉpu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāṉa virutarāja bhaya
ṅkara vaḷanāṭṭu meṟkānāṭṭuk kāvanūrāṉa vīrarājendramaṅkala nila
m yirunūṟṟaimpat teṭṭaraiye mūṉṟu māmukkāṇi Araikkāṇi A
raikkāṇikkīḻ Iraṇṭumā mukkāṇiyum muṉpu Iṟai kaṭṭiṉapaṭiye I
ṟai kaṭṭāya Antarāyap pāṭṭamuppaṭap paḻampaṭiye tevatāna I
ṟaiyiliyāvatu nikkip peruvaḻikkit teṟku Irājendracoḻapuṟata
laikkuk kiḻakku viramātevi vatikku meṟkuṭpaṭṭa nilattu Ittevaṟku mu
ṉpu tevatāṉamāṉa Ātivarāha nallūrilum tirumuṭṭamuṭaiya mahā
devar tevatāṉam cuṅkantavirtta coḻanallūrilum Akappaṭṭa
vaṭakkil tiruccuṟṟuccevamelai piṭāri koyiliṉ kiḻai tiruccuṟṟukku kiḻakkum
Eṟṟa nilamuṭpaṭa yāṇṭu muppat toṉṟāvatiṉ Etirām Āṇṭu mutal tevatāna Iṟaiyili Iru nilam muṉ
Digital edition of SII 39.233 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
